steps.title: Find the location note
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the location of Casa Luis Barragan. The relevant note says it is located in Mexico City, Mexico; other notes describe its architect, design features, and architectural significance.

steps.title: Select the location-focused sentence
steps.content: Choice A names the architect only. Choice B emphasizes architectural features and style. Choice C identifies the architect through the home's features. The location-focused sentence tells readers where someone would go to see the home. The answer is D.
